original_image_tags: A black-and-white photograph of numerous small, bright, blurry lights arranged in an arc or cluster against a dark background.
black-and-white photograph of a man in a suit and tie and glasses, standing in a laboratory setting. He is holding a large glass jar.
black-and-white photograph of a large glass jar filled with liquids. The man's face is visible through the jar, distorted.
black-and-white photograph of a glass rod submerged in the jar of liquids. The rod appears bent at the interface between the liquids.
black-and-white photograph showing a bright light source shining through the side of the jar, with the beam bending at the interface between the liquids.

elements.description: A photograph showing multiple bright, blurry lights against a dark background. Caption below: 'These "lights" were one of many sets of "saucers" made by Dr. Menzel in his laboratory. Note the "mother ship."'

A photograph of a man wearing glasses, with his hands near a large glass jar. Text above: 'Photographed by Arthur Rothstein'. Caption below: 'Dr. Menzel begins setting up his apparatus, using a large glass jar, benzene and acetone.'

A close-up photograph of a large glass jar containing liquids. A distorted face is visible through the jar. Caption below: 'Acetone floating on benzene simulates air levels; lens effect distorts Dr. Menzel's face.'

A photograph showing a glass rod inside a glass container, appearing bent where it passes between liquid layers. Caption below: 'A glass rod seems to bend as it passes from one liquid to other. Light bends in this way.'

A photograph showing light refracting as it passes through liquid layers in a glass container. Caption below: 'A light shining through the liquids bends at the meeting point. Same is true in air layers.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the five photographs, their visual content (bright lights, man with jar, distorted face through jar, bent rod, refracting light), and the specific caption text when quoted.
